title: Heavy Duty Large Mortar and Pestle Set, 100% Granite, Non Slip Base, Make Fresh Guacamole, Salsa, Pesto, Stone Grinder Bowl, Herb Crusher, Spice Grinder, 1.5 Cup, 5.5 Inch Size, Black
description:
About this item
BUILT TO LAST, This thick, chunky solid stone grinder is individually carved by hand from 1 solid piece of naturally formed granite. Your heavy duty guacamole bowl grinder will look great on any countertop and will do for many years to come.
MAKE DELICIOUS GUACAMOLE, SALSA, PESTO and MORE! Home made, fresh delicious guacamole, pesto and more can be made on demand within minutes in the comfort of your home. Create healthy sauces with ease using your granite molcajete that the whole family can enjoy.
GRIND, BLEND and MASH THE FRESHEST FLAVORS: This mortar and pestle set with a generous 1.5 cup capacity and sturdy 6-inch pestle gets the job dine quickly. Crush, grind and pound herbs, nuts, spices and more to release natural flavors and aromas easily with minimum fuss.
DON'T SCRATCH YOUR COUNTERTOP: This black granite stone mortar and pestle is a beast! Super sturdy and heavy enough to leave out on display, but that could cause scratches to your countertop. That's why we have INCLUDED 2 NON SLIP COUNTERTOP PROTECTORS that will protect your valuable counter from any possible scratches.
PREP YOUR GARLIC - FAST: Our customers love using their Priority Chef mortar and pestle to crush garlic. So, we INCLUDED A BPA FREE SILICONE GARLIC PEELER that removes those sticky, papery skins quickly without getting garlic fingers.
reviews_5s:
The set is beautiful, and works great to crush seeds, for example black cumin seeds.
It is heavy and stays in place.
The pestle is comfortable to hold.
Polished well on the outside, and working surface is rough.

Follow the instructions to season it with rice and garlic, and clean it with water only.I ordered one for myself and one for each of my daughters. I got the 4 cup size, which is large enough to serve in if using for guacamole, etc. It is beautiful enough to leave out on a shelf, seems really well-crafted and well-designed. The rough surface on the inside of the bowl and on the pestle should be really good for grinding spices. Should be an improvement over the one I have been using.PROS - Heavy duty, gorgeous granite with a graceful and functional design, comfortable-to- hold pestle, pulverizes on demand, dries fast after hand washing without soap. It comes with a sticker you can put on the base to make the base non-slip (and non-scratching for delicate counter tops).

CONS- Barley any! Because it is heavy, for some it could be awkward. I did experience some random rice grains jumping out before they started getting broken down.
--

If you landed here you still may be wondering, why, with all the modern gadgets that are already in our kitchens, is there a need for this ancient tool? Electric appliances like a spice grinder or food processor only cut up spices and other herbs, but a mortar and pestle crushes and pulverizes them. A mortar and pestle will release aromatics and flavors from the substances' membranes. When you use the tool it smashes into paste ingredients like ginger, garlic, curries, nuts, citrus peels. It may not be the "fastest" method, but it produces the most desirable results. And yes, this Heavy Duty Large Mortar and Pestle set item will not disappoint.

I previously owned a marble mortar and pestle set that was 1 cup size. I could only grind up small batches at one time, and when the mortar fell onto the floor and cracked irreparably, I looked for something larger and more sturdy. That is why I ordered this item in the extra large, 4-cup size. Even though the item takes up a sizable spot on a counter or shelf, it is easy on the eyes if you leave it out. I placed mine in front of my knife block on the kitchen counter.Works great. I need this to mash up vegetables to mix with my guinea pig's recovery food. It makes short work of lettuce, cucumber and bell pepper. Mashes it into a liquid in short order so that it mixes thoroughly with the fine powder of the recovery food. The preparation for use wasn't nearly as difficult as I thought. Most of the granite powder came off with the first wash and the rest with the second. The third wash came out clean. It crushed the rice fairly quickly and only took twice before the rice powder came out clean white. Cleaning it after use was a breeze. I saw many reviews that said the packaging was insufficient and the item arrived broken. That wasn't the case for us. The original packaging was more than sufficient to prevent breakage. Overall a nice set.This a high quality, heavy duty Mortar and Pestle set. Extremely sturdy but beautiful at the same time. It looks great sitting on my kitchen counter. It was easy to season and easy to clean.....just rinse and dry! I have found it great for making guacamole as well as grinding fresh herbs. It presents guacamole beautifully and is big enough to hold a good amount. Love it!This is a great mortar and pestle. It’s very heavy! We bought this for our son who’s a great cook and loves to use spices. Any gadget for the kitchen is aok!It’s very sturdy and ideal for grinding herbs.
It is priced right and looks great.Edit: they got in touch with me and are sending out a new one! Amazing customer service!

Well I opened the box and it came with a shattered pestle.
I emailed the company. I suppose I will see if they send me a new one. I’ll update my review if they do!!
The mortar was fine. VERY STURDY!!Holy moly this thing was heavy, lol. I love this thing, I've always wanted to have one of these in my kitchen cause remembering when I was a kid growing up my mom had one so this is nostalgic for me. We only really just used it to crush garlic then because it was small, but this humongous one ill be making sauces and dips in. I havent used it yet but I can't wait to start. I'm sure whatever I make will turn out great.It is a good looking set and heavy. It was easy to prep for use and looks good out. I like the non-slip pad you can put on the bottom. Not only does it not slip it also will not scratch the table our countertop
reviews_1s:
No,

I will not edit the review.

Post as-is because it’s the truth.

This experience SUCKED and you want honest feedback.

DO BETTER!!when graining no matter what keep releasing particles of dirt or dust and get mix with the food. I donot recommend this product. I returned.it looked like nice product, but was broken twice in shipping. It is a heavy piece and was not protected well enough. had to return it twice.Received item broken, twice, the original and then it's replacement. At that point, decided just to get a refund and buy locally.
(Very unfortunate)terrible quality!!! How can it arrive already broken?Arrived with the pestle literally snapped in twoI ordered this mortar and pastle. First one came and the pestle was broken. I submitted a claim and was quickly sent a replacement which coincidentally had a broken pestle as well. Needless to say I'm not playing this game again. I will not be ordering this brand.They call it "Heavy duty", yet it can't even survive gentle shipping. The first thing I said to my son on receiving the Pestle and Mortar was, "Check the Pestle please, lot of reviews mention broken Pestles." Sure enough the Pestle was broken. If this breakage was due to rough shipping I'd accept it and request a replacement, however it is not! There were no signs of damage on either the shipping box or the items display packaging box. The pestle, a long solid rod of granite, came inside a cheap, thin plastic bubble wrap envelope I wouldn't even trust to protect a postcard. Since the manufacturers can't be bothered to design or use adequate protective packaging I have no reason to think they take any pride in the quality of the items within. I returned it immediately.It arrived shattered & destroyed.
Could not use at all…
